headline: How The Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Story Is Shifting With Robotics, Buybacks And Mixed Analyst Views
summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings’ updated fair value estimate edges to US$102.95 from US$103.05, a change of less than 0.2%, giving you a fresh reference point for where some models currently anchor the stock. The slight adjustment sits alongside mixed Street commentary, with some analysts raising targets and others trimming them as they reassess execution risks and what rating makes sense. Read on to see how these moving pieces fit together so you can follow the evolving narrative around Zimmer Biomet...
